verses.latin_vulgate: Et dixi : Audite, princeps Jacob,  et duces domus Israël :  numquid non vestrum est scire judicium,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וָאֹמַ֗ר שִׁמְעוּ־נָא֙ רָאשֵׁ֣י יַעֲקֹ֔ב וּקְצִינֵ֖י בֵּ֣ית יִשְׂרָאֵ֑ל הֲל֣וֹא לָכֶ֔ם לָדַ֖עַת אֶת־הַמִּשְׁפָּֽט׃
verses.king_james: And I said, Hear, I pray you, O heads of Jacob, and ye princes of the house of Israel; Is it not for you to know judgment?

verses.latin_vulgate: qui odio habetis bonum, et diligitis malum ;  qui violenter tollitis pelles eorum desuper eis,  et carnem eorum desuper ossibus eorum ;
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שֹׂ֥נְאֵי ט֖וֹב וְאֹ֣הֲבֵי (רעה) [רָ֑ע] גֹּזְלֵ֤י עוֹרָם֙ מֵֽעֲלֵיהֶ֔ם וּשְׁאֵרָ֖ם מֵעַ֥ל עַצְמוֹתָֽם׃
verses.king_james: Who hate the good, and love the evil; who pluck off their skin from off them, and their flesh from off their bones;

verses.latin_vulgate: qui comederunt carnem populi mei,  et pellem eorum desuper excoriaverunt,  et ossa eorum confregerunt,  et conciderunt sicut in lebete,  et quasi carnem in medio ollæ ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַאֲשֶׁ֣ר אָכְלוּ֮ שְׁאֵ֣ר עַמִּי֒ וְעוֹרָם֙ מֵעֲלֵיהֶ֣ם הִפְשִׁ֔יטוּ וְאֶת־עַצְמֹֽתֵיהֶ֖ם פִּצֵּ֑חוּ וּפָֽרְשׂוּ֙ כַּאֲשֶׁ֣ר בַּסִּ֔יר וּכְבָשָׂ֖ר בְּת֥וֹךְ קַלָּֽחַת׃
verses.king_james: Who also eat the flesh of my people, and flay their skin from off them; and they break their bones, and chop them in pieces, as for the pot, and as flesh within the caldron.

verses.latin_vulgate: Tunc clamabunt ad Dominum, et non exaudiet eos,  et abscondet faciem suam ab eis in tempore illo,  sicut nequiter egerunt in adinventionibus suis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אָ֚ז יִזְעֲק֣וּ אֶל־יְהֹוָ֔ה וְלֹ֥א יַעֲנֶ֖ה אוֹתָ֑ם וְיַסְתֵּ֨ר פָּנָ֤יו מֵהֶם֙ בָּעֵ֣ת הַהִ֔יא כַּאֲשֶׁ֥ר הֵרֵ֖עוּ מַעַלְלֵיהֶֽם׃ {פ}
verses.king_james: Then shall they cry unto the Lord, but he will not hear them: he will even hide his face from them at that time, as they have behaved themselves ill in their doings.

verses.latin_vulgate: Hæc dicit Dominus super prophetas,  qui seducunt populum meum :  qui mordent dentibus suis,  et prædicant pacem ;  et si quis non dederit in ore eorum quippiam,  sanctificant super eum prælium.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כֹּ֚ה אָמַ֣ר יְהֹוָ֔ה עַל־הַנְּבִיאִ֖ים הַמַּתְעִ֣ים אֶת־עַמִּ֑י הַנֹּשְׁכִ֤ים בְּשִׁנֵּיהֶם֙ וְקָרְא֣וּ שָׁל֔וֹם וַֽאֲשֶׁר֙ לֹא־יִתֵּ֣ן עַל־פִּיהֶ֔ם וְקִדְּשׁ֥וּ עָלָ֖יו מִלְחָמָֽה׃
verses.king_james: Thus saith the Lord concerning the prophets that make my people err, that bite with their teeth, and cry, Peace; and he that putteth not into their mouths, they even prepare war against him.

verses.latin_vulgate: Propterea nox vobis pro visione erit,  et tenebræ vobis pro divinatione ;  et occumbet sol super prophetas,  et obtenebrabitur super eos dies.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לָכֵ֞ן לַ֤יְלָה לָכֶם֙ מֵֽחָז֔וֹן וְחָשְׁכָ֥ה לָכֶ֖ם מִקְּסֹ֑ם וּבָ֤אָה הַשֶּׁ֙מֶשׁ֙ עַל־הַנְּבִיאִ֔ים וְקָדַ֥ר עֲלֵיהֶ֖ם הַיּֽוֹם׃
verses.king_james: Therefore night shall be unto you, that ye shall not have a vision; and it shall be dark unto you, that ye shall not divine; and the sun shall go down over the prophets, and the day shall be dark over them.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et confundentur qui vident visiones,  et confundentur divini ;  et operient omnes vultos suos,  quia non est responsum Dei.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּבֹ֣שׁוּ הַחֹזִ֗ים וְחָֽפְרוּ֙ הַקֹּ֣סְמִ֔ים וְעָט֥וּ עַל־שָׂפָ֖ם כֻּלָּ֑ם כִּ֛י אֵ֥ין מַעֲנֵ֖ה אֱלֹהִֽים׃
verses.king_james: Then shall the seers be ashamed, and the diviners confounded: yea, they shall all cover their lips; for there is no answer of God.

verses.latin_vulgate: Verumtamen ego repletus sum fortitudine spiritus Domini,  judicio, et virtute,  ut annuntiem Jacob scelus suum,  et Israël peccatum suum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאוּלָ֗ם אָנֹכִ֞י מָלֵ֤אתִי כֹ֙חַ֙ אֶת־ר֣וּחַ יְהֹוָ֔ה וּמִשְׁפָּ֖ט וּגְבוּרָ֑ה לְהַגִּ֤יד לְיַֽעֲקֹב֙ פִּשְׁע֔וֹ וּלְיִשְׂרָאֵ֖ל חַטָּאתֽוֹ׃ {פ}
verses.king_james: But truly I am full of power by the spirit of the Lord, and of judgment, and of might, to declare unto Jacob his transgression, and to Israel his sin.

verses.latin_vulgate: Audite hoc, principes domus Jacob,  et judices domus Israël,  qui abominamini judicium,  et omnia recta pervertitis :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שִׁמְעוּ־נָ֣א זֹ֗את רָאשֵׁי֙ בֵּ֣ית יַעֲקֹ֔ב וּקְצִינֵ֖י בֵּ֣ית יִשְׂרָאֵ֑ל הַֽמְתַעֲבִ֣ים מִשְׁפָּ֔ט וְאֵ֥ת כׇּל־הַיְשָׁרָ֖ה יְעַקֵּֽשׁוּ׃
verses.king_james: Hear this, I pray you, ye heads of the house of Jacob, and princes of the house of Israel, that abhor judgment, and pervert all equity.

verses.latin_vulgate: qui ædificatis Sion in sanguinibus,  et Jerusalem in iniquitate.
verses.king_james: They build up Zion with blood, and Jerusalem with iniquity.

verses.latin_vulgate: Principes ejus in muneribus judicabant,  et sacerdotes ejus in mercede docebant,  et prophetæ ejus in pecunia divinabant :  et super Dominum requiescebant, dicentes :  Numquid non Dominus in medio nostrum ?  non venient super nos mala.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: רָאשֶׁ֣יהָ ׀ בְּשֹׁ֣חַד יִשְׁפֹּ֗טוּ וְכֹהֲנֶ֙יהָ֙ בִּמְחִ֣יר יוֹר֔וּ וּנְבִיאֶ֖יהָ בְּכֶ֣סֶף יִקְסֹ֑מוּ וְעַל־יְהֹוָה֙ יִשָּׁעֵ֣נוּ לֵאמֹ֔ר הֲל֤וֹא יְהֹוָה֙ בְּקִרְבֵּ֔נוּ לֹֽא־תָב֥וֹא עָלֵ֖ינוּ רָעָֽה׃
verses.king_james: The heads thereof judge for reward, and the priests thereof teach for hire, and the prophets thereof divine for money: yet will they lean upon the Lord, and say, Is not the Lord among us? none evil can come upon us.

verses.latin_vulgate: Propter hoc, causa vestri, Sion quasi ager arabitur,  et Jerusalem quasi acervus lapidum erit,  et mons templi in excelsa silvarum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לָכֵן֙ בִּגְלַלְכֶ֔ם צִיּ֖וֹן שָׂדֶ֣ה תֵֽחָרֵ֑שׁ וִירוּשָׁלַ֙͏ִם֙ עִיִּ֣ין תִּֽהְיֶ֔ה וְהַ֥ר הַבַּ֖יִת לְבָמ֥וֹת יָֽעַר׃ {פ}
verses.king_james: Therefore shall Zion for your sake be plowed as a field, and Jerusalem shall become heaps, and the mountain of the house as the high places of the forest.
